name: NEPSE Index
description: The NEPSE Index is the benchmark stock market index of the Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE), tracking the overall performance of all listed equities on the exchange. Launched in 1994, it is the primary indicator of Nepal's stock market sentiment and is computed as a free-float market-capitalisation weighted index.
highlights: Benchmark index of the Nepal Stock Exchange
Covers every listed equity on NEPSE
Free-float market-cap weighted
Base value: 100 (12 February 1994)

name: Banking Sub-Index
description: The NEPSE Banking Sub-Index tracks the share price performance of all commercial banks listed on the Nepal Stock Exchange. Commercial banks are typically the largest sector by market cap on NEPSE, and this sub-index is a key gauge of financial sector health.
highlights: Tracks all listed commercial banks on NEPSE
Largest sector by market capitalization
Key indicator of Nepal's financial sector health

name: Hydropower Sub-Index
description: The NEPSE Hydropower Sub-Index tracks the share price performance of hydroelectric power generation companies listed on the Nepal Stock Exchange. Hydropower is a strategically important sector for Nepal given the country's abundant water resources.
highlights: Covers all listed hydropower companies on NEPSE
Strategically important sector for Nepal
Closely watched by retail investors

name: Life Insurance Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed life insurance companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed life insurance companies on NEPSE

name: Non-Life Insurance Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed non-life (general) insurance companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed non-life insurance companies on NEPSE

name: Microfinance Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed microfinance institutions (Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha) on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed microfinance institutions on NEPSE

name: Development Banks Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed development banks on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed development banks on NEPSE

name: Finance Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed finance companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed finance companies on NEPSE

name: Hotels & Tourism Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed hotel and tourism sector companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed hotel and tourism companies on NEPSE

name: Manufacturing & Processing Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed manufacturing and processing companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed manufacturing and processing companies on NEPSE

name: Trading Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed trading sector companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed trading companies on NEPSE

name: Investment Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed investment companies on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed investment companies on NEPSE

name: Mutual Fund Sub-Index
description: Tracks listed mutual fund schemes on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers all listed mutual fund schemes on NEPSE

name: Others Sub-Index
description: Tracks other listed sector companies (e.g. Nepal Telecom, Nepal Doorsanchar) on the Nepal Stock Exchange.
highlights: Covers listed companies outside the main sub-indexes
